mission.title: cloud-custodian: Dont require countUnit in ecr lifecycles

resolution.summary:
Thanks for the add! Something to be aware of there is that it will look for the countUnit if countType is sinceImagePushed. 
https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECR/latest/userguide/LifecyclePolicies.html
But fortunately there is already a validation in place on line 203.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
I updated my comment, its called at validation time already so it shouldnt be necessary to add complex schema validation
> I updated my comment, its called at validation time already so it shouldnt be necessary to add complex schema validation

the issue is that python validation isn't fully correct to handle all cases (per the note I wrote inline to that function), ie. this is missing countNumber and passes validation, but blows up at runtime.
